description: Connects the Laporta master integrals (PHYS-46 independence program) to the QED alpha extraction chain (PHYS-38) through the A4 coefficient decomposition. The six Laporta constants contribute to a_e at the 10^-11 level, which is at or just above the Harvard measurement precision of 10^-12. Decomposing A4 shows how much of alpha depends on these potentially new constants.
thesis: The A4 QED coefficient decomposes into analytically known terms plus six Laporta master integral contributions. The Laporta piece shifts alpha_inv by order 1 ppb. The Harvard measurement constrains but does not determine the individual Laporta constants.
formula: A4 = A4_known + c1*C81a + c2*C81b + c3*C81c + c4*C83a + c5*C83b + c6*C83c
